examples: Guards of Lenin's mausoleum were in felt boots with galoshes.
Guards of Lenin's mausoleum in felt boots with galoshes.
A cemetery in Spain has placed solar panels atop its mausoleum.
The Uzbeks consider the mausoleum a holy place and pray here before heading off on Hadj.
Thanks to Netzer's research we now know that the mausoleum was an 82-foot tower.
